message:
Fix getConfigFromDB: use Dolt store instead of raw SQLite

getConfigFromDB used sql.Open("sqlite3", ...) which fails with Dolt backend.
Replace with dolt.New() using the configured database path from metadata.json.
Update tests to create Dolt stores at the canonical path (beads.db directory).

Fixes: bd-2pu9j

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
